{{Infobox character
| name = Zyrana
| introduced = The Knight
}}

== The Knight ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[Zyrana]] is a second-generation [[Perfected]].<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c36">''The Knight'', chapter 36</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[Zyrana]] is a [[Perfected]] combatant.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c36" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[Zyrana]] can activate a [[Subspace Rupture]].<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c36" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:The Knight]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon characters]]
